headline: Is WEC Energy Group (WEC) Fairly Priced After Recent Dividend Stability Focus?
summary: If you are wondering whether WEC Energy Group at around US$113 per share still offers fair value, the key is to understand how its current price lines up with different valuation measures. The stock most recently closed at US$113.41, with returns of 3.5% over the past week, a decline of 1.0% over the past month, 6.5% year to date, 9.8% over the past year, 45.3% over three years and 43.0% over five years. These figures give useful context before looking at valuation. Recent news coverage...
